textByHash.367a3d29568d4c5fd04789d1721c0f7e8faf031d: Hello. Do I know you? You seem remarkably familiar...
textByHash.d79a302000c0039180258baf56f3ab82c7486125: If you say so. Anyway, what do you want?
textByHash.25da7cae0d6c33e183a85e06468286d86b04eb6c: I wouldn't know anything about that. You should see Caranock.
textByHash.3216eab09ec5cac567baa45902158f6b769a698d: The workers are getting restless, Caranock.
textByHash.75ee8be2046ef04287130d21b4f240492fd0a425: All this talk of Glough being replaced doesn't bode well for ... how shall I put this ... their morale.
textByHash.b3a88d0a2af4192f8b6ab1f6706724c860a9dfea: Those are all men with children to feed. Famished families. Worried wives. All of us rely on this shipyard.
textByHash.d27d72e2f7007f230ab82b065b39370394e7c227: If something isn't done soon, there'll be revolt. And I won't be able to stop it.
textByHash.32290f76e7fb514e544691f80e0613b0271f4d25: What something? You're always working on something. All we ever hear is bad news.
textByHash.2762d8ddf8abee34f83df98d5a2134267ba77b90: First, Glough disappears. Then news of a missing squad of the Royal Guard in our area. And what about that human sent by the King?
textByHash.7fb54fb54b9f56e11e651c3a587eca271ca8f112: I am still worried. What am I meant to tell the men?
textByHash.3f3473c91ed22dbb98ae25ce2f90c73e9801e59d: I hope you're right, Caranock, for your sake. My sake. For all of our sakes...
textByHash.bdbcc32b6e015dedecf5fb194dddc814eeb736d5: Hmm...in that case we'd better go to my office. Follow me.
textByHash.645dc7e18b5ce0146216d1d975b35f8a48d0e735: Tell me again why you're here.
textByHash.49ae70d1b4784cd3ec00d70cc2ab0e7bdc043ba0: By the way how is Glough? Still with his wife?
textByHash.ba2d8e8ef300d28a2293c63db7a0e1079bdf9c46: Really? That's odd, considering she died last year. Die imposter!
textByHash.d094d36b0ce2bdf8341cb575725714b9744c1fec: Right answer. I have to watch for imposters. What's Glough's favourite dish?
textByHash.8bb98bbb9283a777e27399dcf4050a92dabfc980: Our survey said.... Bzzzzzz! Wrong answer!
textByHash.983a49326ee8b7de14bbc9204773fc3823c8307b: OK. Just one more. What's the name of his new girlfriend?
textByHash.179ab5a37bc1df3d9ac3b0519d9bc51e5aba7c79: Well, well, you do know Glough. Sorry for the interrogation but I'm sure you understand.
textByHash.42ca56247a631c0985acb28713f3c6e23f91a35a: As you can see things are going well.
textByHash.81d6052bdc0893538d60b5c7103f6b0e944864f1: When I was asked to build a fleet large enough to invade Port Sarim and carry 300 gnome troops I said: 'If anyone can, I can.'
textByHash.012fb5e8cd4f805b0b6d7b53f0e9e7e8ca77ac7f: True but if the gnomes are really going to take over Gielinor they'll need at least that.
textByHash.ae21f97d7dbd55fb1079731cb18a9452672e1585: Of course, why else would Glough want 30 battleships? Between you and me I don't think he stands a chance.
textByHash.6e6f3a713490ad7003c84826f434c9cd8ac8a709: I mean, for the kind of battleships Glough's ordered I'll need tons and tons of lumber! Still, if he says he can supply the wood I'm sure he can! Anyway, here's the order for the lumber.
textByHash.67a82f3f720b66b122d3c23e6a9293272cfb4b0f: You almost had me fooled! Die imposter!
